summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Teamtailor integration added to Taplo MVP. All backend API endpoints working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with proper error handling and user experience.
passed_tests: GET /api/teamtailor/status returns {connected: false, has_key: false} when no key configured
GET /api/teamtailor/sync-status returns {connected: false, should_sync: false} when no key configured
POST /api/teamtailor/connect with invalid key returns 400 with 'Invalid API key' error
POST /api/teamtailor/sync without key returns 400 error with proper message
DELETE /api/teamtailor/disconnect works even when not connected
Admin login with admin@taplo.io / TaploAdmin2026! works and redirects to dashboard
All 4 sidebar nav items visible and functional: Pipeline, Daily Digest, Stats, Teamtailor
Teamtailor page loads correctly at /dashboard/teamtailor route
Teamtailor page shows Connect card with API key input field and Connect button
Connect button is properly disabled when input field is empty
Connect button enables when text is entered in API key field
Invalid API key shows proper error message 'Invalid API key' on the page
Setup instructions displayed with clear 3-step process for getting API key
Pipeline page still works correctly with existing candidates CRUD functionality
Add Candidate button present and functional on Pipeline page
All existing core functionality remains intact (18/18 backend APIs working)

success_percentage.backend: 100% (23/23 API endpoints working including 5 new Teamtailor endpoints)
success_percentage.frontend: 100% (all Teamtailor UI components working, existing functionality intact)
